title: Quality Control Systems Managers
description: Plan, direct, or coordinate quality assurance programs. Formulate quality control policies and control quality of laboratory and production efforts.

tasks.text: Stop production if serious product defects are present.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Review and update standard operating procedures or quality assurance manuals.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Monitor performance of quality control systems to ensure effectiveness and efficiency.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review quality documentation necessary for regulatory submissions and inspections.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Analyze quality control test results and provide feedback and interpretation to production management or staff.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Verify that raw materials, purchased parts or components, in-process samples, and finished products meet established testing and inspection standards.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Oversee workers including supervisors, inspectors, or laboratory workers engaged in testing activities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct product testing activities throughout production cycles.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Instruct staff in quality control and analytical procedures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Direct the tracking of defects, test results, or other regularly reported quality control data.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Participate in the development of product specifications.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Identify quality problems or areas for improvement and recommend solutions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collect and analyze production samples to evaluate quality.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Produce reports regarding nonconformance of products or processes, daily production quality, root cause analyses, or quality trends.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Communicate quality control information to all relevant organizational departments, outside vendors, or contractors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor development of new products to help identify possible problems for mass production.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Identify critical points in the manufacturing process and specify sampling procedures to be used at these points.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Create and implement inspection and testing criteria or procedures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Document testing procedures, methodologies, or criteria.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Review statistical studies, technological advances, or regulatory standards and trends to stay abreast of issues in the field of quality control.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Coordinate the selection and implementation of quality control equipment, such as inspection gauges.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Generate and maintain quality control operating budgets.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Instruct vendors or contractors on quality guidelines, testing procedures, or ways to eliminate deficiencies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with marketing and sales departments to define client requirements and expectations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate new testing and sampling methodologies or technologies to determine usefulness.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Review and approve quality plans submitted by contractors.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Audit and inspect subcontractor facilities including external laboratories.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.
